title: Report on the modified Capacity Market scheme
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to DESNZ concerning the proposed Capacity Market Scheme, as amended in 2025.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of DESNZ’s assessment of compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the Capacity Market Scheme by DESNZ case page. "
